Class ResourceReaderRepositoryPopulatorBeanDefinitionParser

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.beans.factory.xml.AbstractBeanDefinitionParser
org.springframework.beans.factory.xml.AbstractSingleBeanDefinitionParser
org.springframework.data.repository.config.ResourceReaderRepositoryPopulatorBeanDefinitionParser
All Implemented Interfaces:
BeanDefinitionParser
public class ResourceReaderRepositoryPopulatorBeanDefinitionParser extends AbstractSingleBeanDefinitionParser
BeanDefinitionParser to parse repository initializers.
Author:
Oliver Gierke, Johannes Englmeier
